title: 8 Pieces Dinner Spoons, Stainless Steel Spoon Set, Mirror Polished Tablespoon, 18.5cm Soup Spoons, Silver Dessert Spoons, Table Spoons Cutlery for Home, Kitchen or Restaurant, Dishwasher Safe
features: 【Dinner Spoons Set of 8】The dinner spoon set contains 8 stainless steel dessert spoons, perfect for home or restaurant and a fantastic replacement for lost dinner spoon cutlery. The dinner spoons measure 1.6*7.3 inches/ 4*18.5 cm.

【High-Quality and Durable Spoons】This set of tablespoon is made of high quality food grade stainless steel, which is corrosion and rust resistant and therefore won't affect your health. Meanwhile, the sturdy and durable construction ensures that the spoons will not be easily bent and will be used in the long run.

【Classic Designs】 The dessert spoon has smooth, burr-free edges and a mirror-polished surface that is safe for the mouth. The table spoon has a classic and simple design and can be used with existing cutlery. Meanwhile, the ergonomic design is comfortable to use.

【Dishwasher Safe 】These soup spoons are both hand washable and dishwasher safe. The spoons have a smooth surface that does not easily leave stains. To protect the spoons, do not use wire brushes or other hard cleaning tools to clean the spoons.

【Widely Used】This multi-functional spoons cutlery set is suitable for a variety of dining occasions, such as weddings, parties, celebrations, family dinners, picnics and barbecues. Ideal for serving yoghurt, oats, mashed potatoes, soups, paella and ice cream.
